text.title: llamaindex-production-gotchas Failure Modes
text.summary: 4 high-impact failure modes for llamaindex-production-gotchas with detectors and fixes that map back to rules in 01-core-rules.xml.

antipattern.root-cause: Used .query() inside an async endpoint; blocks loop.
antipattern.fix: Use .aquery() everywhere; run heavy CPU in a threadpool.
antipattern.detector: Spawn 50 concurrent requests; verify no head-of-line blocking.

antipattern.symptom: QueryFusionRetriever opens 30 concurrent LLM calls and trips rate limits
antipattern.fix: Set num_workers=4-8; or wrap with asyncio.Semaphore(8).

antipattern.symptom: ReActAgent silently returns 'I cannot continue' when one tool fails
antipattern.fix: Wrap each tool to return structured error string; agent reasoning handles.
antipattern.detector: Inject a failing tool; verify graceful continuation.

antipattern.symptom: Eval cost jumps to $80 per CI run
antipattern.root-cause: Faithfulness + relevancy + correctness on full sample set.
antipattern.fix: Sample 10-50 per metric; rotate; rate-limit by build budget.
